ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family of four (two men and two girls) embracing, with a focus on protective and loving gestures. The animation will primarily involve the arms, highlighting the protective nature of the two men and the endearing closeness of the children.  The movement will be gentle and slow, emphasizing the emotional connection. Frame 1 will show the two men's arms around the children; frame 2 will show the children's arms around each other; frame 3 will show the children slightly leaning into their fathers; and frame 4 will show a gentle rocking motion, emphasizing the family's unity and love.

frames.beat: arms open wide, ready for embrace
gentle rocking, a loving family unit
